title: Integrated Distribution
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/integrated-distribution-inc/348479499 ntegrated Distribution Inc. is a prominent industrial distributor based in Comstock Park, Michigan, serving local manufacturers since 1998. The company specializes in fast-response sourcing, technical support, and the supply of critical components such as bearings, belts, motors, and power transmission parts. With a strong focus on minimizing equipment downtime, IDI provides tailored industrial solutions for diverse sectors, including automotive, food processing, and packaging
